data.rationale: Customer PII cannot be exported to an external LLM vendor destination.

matched_instructions.title: Require controls before customer export
matched_instructions.description: Customer exports require approval and anonymization when sent to approved external systems.

prohibitions: Do not export customer PII to EXTERNAL_LLM_VENDOR.

agent_action.message: Block the export; external LLM vendors are a denied destination for customer PII.
